description: Trace coroutine scope, dispatcher, cancellation, and exception propagation for hangs or missing work.
body: Inputs: symptom, coroutine code path, and test runner. Actions: identify scope owner, builder, dispatcher, Flow collection, timeout, and cancellation; use existing coroutine test utilities; verify no detached job remains. Do not fix by adding arbitrary sleeps. Verification is deterministic pass/fail or logged cancellation path. Use when Kotlin Engineering work touches repository conventions, toolchain files, changed symbols, validation commands, and runtime output. Do not use this guidance to override a more specific pack, user instruction, or repository contract. Actions: run the documented inspection and validation workflow; inspect the current files first, keep the change scoped to the owning boundary, and record what evidence changed the decision. Validation signals include package-local checks, focused tests, build output, smoke runs, and command logs. Risk boundary: escalate or stop when the task involves broad rewrites, generated-file drift, stale assumptions, and unvalidated behavior changes, missing owner evidence, or live external state.
